caption:
Have you ever seen a wagyu fat-fried cheeseburger? 🍔

元祖の切ったやつは東京に来た！

@briskstand_asakusa is the first Tokyo location of the famous Kobe burger joint known for their original way of cooking cheeseburgers. 100% domestic Japanese beef is topped with caramelized onions and cheese before being cut in half, and then cooked again in its own fat, creating a crispy, burnt inside packed with all kinds of umami.

🏷️ ¥2350 切ったやつダブルパティ Sliced Double Patty Burger

📍 BRISKSTAND ASAKUSA（ブリスクスタンドアサクサ） (2 Chome-9-16 Kotobuki, Taito City, Tokyo 111-0042, Japan)

#PR #wagyu #burger #tokyoeats #tokyofood #東京グルメ
transcript: This is Japan's Wagyu Fat Fried Cheeseburger. 100% Japanese beef patties, caramelized onions, and cheddar cheese are stacked, sliced in half, and fried in pure Wagyu fat, unleashing a whole new level of umami.

transcript_segments.text: This is Japan's Wagyu Fat Fried Cheeseburger.
100% Japanese beef patties, caramelized onions, and cheddar cheese are stacked, sliced in
half, and fried in pure Wagyu fat, unleashing a whole new level of umami.
